introSection: Shockwave Riders is a launched spinning roller coaster built by Chinese firm Jinma Rides currently located at Guangzhou Joypolis in Zengcheng, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.
fullText: Shockwave Riders is a launched spinning roller coaster built by Chinese firm Jinma Rides currently located at Guangzhou Joypolis in Zengcheng, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.
